serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki 4 Series F32 LCI.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years after first change; garage.wiki lists first brake fluid change at 3 years.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling) per garage.wiki 4 Series.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki 4 Series.
serviceNotes.timing chain: Chain-driven; monitor at very high mileage.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR/intake soot; ~120,000 km when needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2017/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2017/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2017/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual F32
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2017/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2017/service-intervals.html — fuel filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval (F32 LCI)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval (F32 LCI)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
